title: Toast
description: A component that displays temporary notifications or messages to users, with support for different types, auto-dismissal, and custom positioning.

sections.title: Color Variants
sections.description: Explore different color schemes for toast notifications using the color property.

sections.title: Service Methods
sections.description: Convenience methods for different toast types using AXToastService.

sections.title: Positioning
sections.description: Different locations for toast notifications using the location property.

sections.title: Timeout and Progress Bar
sections.description: Different timeout durations and progress bar options for auto-dismissal behavior.

sections.title: Icon Customization
sections.description: Custom icons vs default icons based on color type for visual customization.

sections.title: Pause on Hover
sections.description: Interactive behavior when hovering over toast notifications to pause auto-dismissal.

sections.title: Translation Support
sections.description: Toast notifications with internationalization support using translation keys.

props.name: config
props.description: Configuration object containing toast display options.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Closes the toast notification.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Closes all toast notifications.
 */
closeAll(): void

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

/**
 * Shows a toast notification with the specified configuration.
 *
 * @param config - The toast display configuration.
 * @returns AXToastRef - Reference to the created toast for programmatic control.
 */
show(config: AXToastDisplayConfig): AXToastRef

/**
 * Shows a primary toast notification.
 *
 * @param content - The message content to display.
 */
primary(content: string): void

/**
 * Shows a secondary toast notification.
 *
 * @param content - The message content to display.
 */
secondary(content: string): void

/**
 * Shows a success toast notification.
 *
 * @param content - The message content to display.
 */
success(content: string): void

/**
 * Shows a warning toast notification.
 *
 * @param content - The message content to display.
 */
warning(content: string): void

/**
 * Shows a danger toast notification.
 *
 * @param content - The message content to display.
 */
danger(content: string): void

/**
 * Shows a default toast notification.
 *
 * @param content - The message content to display.
 */
default(content: string): void

/**
 * Hides all active toast notifications.
 */
hideAll(): void
